pr-evidence/cross-check-probe-action-evi.gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 approved the probe/action release-evidence cross-check PR with no findings.
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_release_evidence.py tests/test_release_bundle.py tests/test_project_governance.py tests/test_public_package.py -q
poetry run python -m compileall -q src tests
what_changed: Release evidence now cross-checks each backend's native engine probe record against its connector-action sidecar.
Release evidence rejects mismatches in request id, block count, copied token count, copied byte count, and copied segment count.
pr-evidence/cross-check-probe-action-evi.why: Strict V1 release evidence should prove that connector-action sidecars audit the same native probe run rather than merely being independently valid JSON.
